Her skin is partially augmented with sleek chrome implants along her jawline and temple, glowing faintly with embedded circuitry patterns in electric blue and violet. The background dissolves into a blurred dystopian cityscape of towering megastructures, flickering neon signs in Japanese and English, and dense smog pierced by laser beams. The composition emphasizes the clean geometric line of her silhouette against the chaotic luminous backdrop, creating a powerful contrast between human form and technological sprawl.
